PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Mar-08-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Lillian Ng, via ZOOM, for Carmen Davidson, via ZOOM, Petitioner; Widmark Huerta and Regino Huerta, via ZOOM, in propria persona, Interested Parties.

The court notes the objection filed by Regino Huerta which has been reviewed by the court. The court advises that Mr. Huerta's objection did not establish a foundation to not appoint Ms. Davidson as Administrator in this matter and his objection is overruled. The court confirms with Regino Huerta that he understands the court's tentative ruling to grant the instant petition and appoint Ms. Davidson as Administrator of the estate. Accordingly, the Petition for Letters of Administration is granted. Carmen Davidson is appointed Administrator of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Isidoor Bornstein is appointed probate referee. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for Mar-21-2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: C. Gomez Not reported.
